_meta: Seed eval run: old TalentBridge AI (baseline) vs QuickTeam re-oriented scorer v1.0.0 (candidate), on the 61-entry human holdout. Decision uses the plan's gate: promote iff agreement >= baseline AND >= 90 AND false-disqualify not worse.

runs.gate_note: beats baseline (77 vs 67) and cuts lost leads 20->4; below the 90% target so learning loop continues
